subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their roles, and contact addresses from the multi-party contract document

plan.cost_rationale: This is a single document extraction task requiring structured field collection (parties with multiple nested fields: name, role, contact address). Mid tier is appropriate because the task involves extracting multiple related fields for potentially many parties, requiring moderate schema understanding and potential inference of role classifications from contract context. A single extract subtask handles all parties in one call—no decomposition needed. No cross-source reconciliation, policy evaluation, or multi-tool orchestration is required."
